title: cynodon prostratus
intro: Cynodon prostratus, also known as button grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Cynodon prostratus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. Cynodon prostratus is typically prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
